author_rating_explanation: First author Wangxuan Fan is affiliated with The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen, a reputable university, but has only 2 citations and 2 papers, indicating limited track record. Last/corresponding author Zhongxiang Dai is also affiliated with The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen and has a strong citation signal with 1639 citations and 57 papers, indicating an established researcher. The combination of a solid university affiliation and one well-cited established researcher supports a strong but not elite rating.
